specSection:
resolveOrCreate :: Topic → (Task, EntryPoint)
resolveOrCreate(T) =
  | isTaskId(T) → (lookupTask(T), fromStatus(lookupTask(T).status))
  | otherwise   → (createTask(T), ProposalLoop)
ground_truth_rationale: Topic matches pattern ^task-\d+$ (case-insensitive), so resolveOrCreate takes the isTaskId branch: lookupTask('TASK-42'). This is a clear task ID — no ambiguity.
